ts-order-service authority and CORS configuration surface

candidateCovers.label: cross-service measurement surface for money/order-status/authority-declaration-order conventions shared between ts-order-service and ts-order-other-service order endpoints

notes: single-method component wrapping AmqpTemplate.convertAndSend, queue name symbol not resolvable from this file
four near-identical mail-composition methods differing only by template name and model fields
boilerplate Spring Boot bootstrap with load-balanced RestTemplate bean
the broad permitAll matcher for orderOther/** is declared before the role-restricted verb matchers below it
orderPay and status-change endpoints use GET verb though they mutate order state
accountId and previousOrderId carry JPA GeneratedValue annotations though this DTO is not an @Entity
interface only, behavior surveyed via OrderOtherServiceImpl
price is passed through as an unparsed String end to end, including a string literal negative sentinel on the not-found branch of getOrderPrice
rabbitmq/cloud-stream binding block is present but fully commented out in this service's config
boilerplate bootstrap identical in shape to ts-order-other-service's application class
role-restricted verb matchers are declared before the broad permitAll matcher here, the reverse order from ts-order-other-service's SecurityConfig
endpoint route set is structurally identical to ts-order-other-service's OrderOtherController with /orderOther replaced by /order
